3135010.name: Evan Brodo's Gone Fishin'
3135010.description:
A lost and confused Evan Brodo is looking for his old pal. Along the way he meets the town locals, some freaks and even a couple fish. 

Explore the world finding fishing spots and magnet fishing spots. Shoot the fish and scavange for metal trinkets. Sell your catches and interact with the locals. Uncover the mystery that lay benith the murky waters of this topsy turvy lake and the townsfolk that mill around it.
3135010.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
